name: Liver Pate
recipeInstructions:
1. Marinate the livers in cognac overnight. Drain and set aside.
2. Soak the dried porcini mushrooms in hot water for 1 hour. Drain and squeeze out excess liquid.
3. Melt 3 tablespoons butter in a pan over medium heat.
4. Add the chopped onion, garlic, and mushrooms to the pan. Cook until the onions are translucent.
5. Add the livers to the pan and cook until they are no longer pink on all sides.
6. Stir in the cream, porcini mushrooms, spices, madeira wine, and cognac. Reduce the mixture by half over medium heat.
7. Turn off the heat. Remove the liver pieces from the pan using a slotted spoon and transfer to a blender or food processor. Blend until smooth, adding small amounts of hot cream if needed to achieve a creamy texture.
8. Return the blended mixture to the pan and stir in the remaining butter while still warm.
9. Pour the pate into a serving dish and refrigerate until set.
10. Optionally, garnish with gelatin before serving.
